---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for ClawdFoot
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: sanchez314c
---

## Description

What feature would you like to see?

## Use Case

Why do you need this? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Implementation

If you have ideas on how this could work, describe them here. Keep in mind:

- The script must stay fast (runs on every Claude Code interaction)
- No network calls allowed
- No external dependencies beyond jq/bc
- Output must remain exactly two lines

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples from other tools, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
